Footer.tagline: On-Device AI digital defense that fuses smart detection, psychological intervention, and social accountability to free students from online gambling.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 Gamblock-AI. Built for the Student Creativity Program (PKM).

LandingPage.subtitle: Gamblock-AI is more than a blocker. It's an On-Device AI digital defense ecosystem fusing smart detection, Pattern Interrupt psychological intervention, and social accountability, helping students break free from online gambling without sacrificing privacy.
LandingPage.heroStatLabel: Online gambling money flow in Indonesia throughout 2025.
LandingPage.crisisTitle: Online gambling isn't entertainment. It's a generational crisis.
LandingPage.crisisSubtitle: The data speaks: losses and the number of young victims keep growing. Gamblock-AI is built as a real answer.
LandingPage.problemTitle: Blocking without intervention just moves the problem.
LandingPage.problemBody: Gambling operators swap domains and URLs the moment they're blocked, even hijacking government and campus domains. Worse, blocking without psychological follow-up triggers reactance: users seek alternative routes via VPN or proxy. A real solution must unite content-based detection with automatic psychological intervention.
LandingPage.problemPoint1: Static blacklists can't keep up with rotating domains.
LandingPage.problemPoint2: Conventional DNS can't see camouflaged page content.
LandingPage.problemPoint3: Blocking without rehabilitation drives users to workarounds.
LandingPage.featuresSubtitle: From detection to recovery, every layer works together to close the gaps left by conventional blockers.
LandingPage.f1Title: Reads gambling-site camouflage in real time.
LandingPage.f1Body: Hybrid Analysis combines Rule-Based logic for explicit URL patterns with Logistic Regression that analyses page content (DOM). Text from titles, headings, and anchors becomes a Bag-of-Words vector, accurately separating camouflaged gambling sites from legitimate ones.
LandingPage.f1Bullet2: Minimises false positives on academic & gov sites
LandingPage.f2Title: Interrupts the impulse at the most critical second.
LandingPage.f2Body: When a gambling site is detected, the system doesn't just block. A 5–10 second graphic animation (Pattern Interrupt) appears automatically to break the impulsive response while the brain seeks dopamine, holding the user back before they slip further.
LandingPage.f3Body: The biggest temptation is deleting the app when urges peak. The Social Accountability Protocol requires registered partner approval for every uninstall request (family or peer). This procedural friction keeps users on the recovery path.
LandingPage.f3Bullet3: Group Code links member to partner
LandingPage.f4Body: A Self-Regulation Theory psychoeducation web guides users through intention-setting, impulse-awareness content, a mood tracker, daily missions, and a reflection journal secured with AES-256-GCM encryption.
LandingPage.howStep1Body: Install the lightweight app on Android/Windows, then enter the Group Code from your partner to lock in protection.
LandingPage.howStep2Body: The system runs silently as a background service, analysing page content without sending data off-device.
LandingPage.howStep3Body: On detection, access is blocked instantly, Pattern Interrupt appears, then the user is guided to self-regulation missions.
LandingPage.techTitle: Intelligence that runs inside your device.
LandingPage.techSubtitle: An On-Device AI architecture with the Edge Computing paradigm, all inference runs locally, never sending browsing history to any server.
LandingPage.techCard1Body: No URLs, domains, or history leave the device. Aligned with the data-minimisation principle of Indonesia's Data Privacy Law.
LandingPage.techCard2Body: The Logistic Regression model is quantised (TFLite/ONNX) to under 5 MB, running without taxing CPU/RAM.
LandingPage.techCard3Body: Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, focused on minimising false positives on legitimate sites.
LandingPage.psychoBody: After Pattern Interrupt breaks the urge, users are guided to a psychoeducation page that builds self-control cyclically: goal-setting, monitoring, evaluation, and adjustment.
LandingPage.psychoItem1Body: Maps daily emotions to recognise urge triggers.
LandingPage.psychoItem2Body: Small self-control tasks that build adaptive habits.
LandingPage.psychoItem3Body: AES-256-GCM encrypted personal notes, fully private.
LandingPage.platformBody: Runs as a background service on Android (Accessibility Service) and Windows (System Service) for end-to-end protection, online or offline.
LandingPage.teamTitle: Built with research methods, by students for students.
LandingPage.teamBody: Gamblock-AI is a 2026 Student Creativity Program, Creative Work (PKM-KC) proposal under the theme Strengthening Education, Science, and Technology. Developed by a cross-disciplinary informatics and psychology team, funded by Belmawa, Ministry of Education.
LandingPage.teamMember1Task: Leads project management and team coordination, builds the cross-platform system, and crawls URL datasets and page content (DOM) structure.
LandingPage.teamMember2Task: Multimedia captain: crafting social media content strategy, writing scripts, shooting footage, and editing anti-gambling videos for students.
LandingPage.teamMember3Task: Core AI developer: training, optimising, and testing the hybrid detection model, and hunting secondary datasets for on-device accuracy.
LandingPage.teamMember4Task: The mind behind the app's psychological intervention (Pattern Interrupt & psychoeducation), and guardian of Belmawa administration from finances to logbooks.
LandingPage.faqQ1: Does Gamblock-AI monitor my browsing history?
LandingPage.faqA1: No. All analysis runs locally on your device (On-Device AI). URLs, domains, and browsing history are never sent to any server, in line with the data-minimisation principle of the Data Privacy Law.
LandingPage.faqQ2: How does it detect gambling sites that change domains?
LandingPage.faqA2: Instead of relying only on blacklists, Gamblock-AI analyses page content (DOM) with Hybrid Analysis, combining Rule-Based and Logistic Regression to recognise gambling patterns even when domains change.
LandingPage.faqA3: A brief 5–10 second graphic animation that appears automatically when a gambling site is detected, designed to break the impulsive response before the urge strengthens, then guide the user to the psychoeducation space.
LandingPage.faqQ4: Why is an Accountability Partner needed?
LandingPage.faqA4: Because the biggest temptation is deleting the app when urges peak. Partner approval creates procedural friction that protects the recovery commitment.
LandingPage.faqA5: Yes. Gamblock-AI is a non-commercial academic prototype developed within the PKM-KC 2026 program.
LandingPage.ctaBody: Free, 100% private, and designed by and for Indonesian students. Take back control of your life now.
LandingPage.teamAdvisorTask: Guides the research and development direction, safeguards methodological quality, and provides academic validation at every phase of the PKM-KC program.

DampakContent.heroTitle: Online gambling isn't entertainment. It's a
DampakContent.heroBody: Throughout 2025, online gambling money flow in Indonesia hit staggering numbers and millions were ensnared. Students sit at the heart of this crisis, and Gamblock-AI is built as the answer.
DampakContent.demoTitle: Young people carry the heaviest burden.
DampakContent.demoBody: The impact on students is destructive and layered: misuse of tuition money, entanglement with illegal online loans, and severe psychological distress, stress, anxiety, and depression.
DampakContent.whyTitle: Blocking without intervention just moves the problem.
DampakContent.whyBody: Gambling operators swap domains and URLs the moment they're blocked, even hijacking government domains. Worse, blocking without psychological follow-up triggers reactance, users seek alternative routes via VPN or proxy. A true solution must unite smart detection with automatic psychological intervention.
DampakContent.arc1Body: The urge appears; the user accesses a gambling site.
DampakContent.arc2Body: A 5–10 second visual animation breaks the impulsive response.
DampakContent.arc3Body: Guided to a Self-Regulation Theory psychoeducation module.
DampakContent.arc4Body: Mood tracker, daily missions, and a reflection journal build self-control.
DampakContent.ctaBody: Free, 100% private, designed by and for Indonesian students. Take back control of your life now.

TechnologyContent.heroBody: Conventional static blacklist blocking loses to gambling sites that swap domains daily. Gamblock-AI answers with Hybrid Analysis and On-Device AI: detecting from page content, not just the address, all without touching your privacy.
TechnologyContent.pipelineTitle: From access to block, in milliseconds.
TechnologyContent.pipelineSubtitle: Five sequential stages executed entirely on your device.
TechnologyContent.pipe1Body: The background service observes network activity.
TechnologyContent.pipe2Body: Text from key page elements (title, heading, anchor) is extracted.
TechnologyContent.pipe3Body: Text is represented as Bag-of-Words numeric features.
TechnologyContent.pipe4Body: Rule-Based + Logistic Regression score the page.
TechnologyContent.pillarsTitle: Designed for accuracy, built for privacy.
TechnologyContent.pillar1Body: Two detection layers: explicit address patterns caught by rules, camouflaged sites exposed by a content-based Logistic Regression model.
TechnologyContent.pillar2Body: Captures hidden text, meta tags, and element structure in real time before gambling content can render.
TechnologyContent.pillar3Body: Logistic Regression is chosen for being lightweight with low computational complexity, running efficiently in the background.
TechnologyContent.pillar4Body: No browsing history is sent to any server. All AI computation runs directly on your device's local processor.
TechnologyContent.pillar5Body: End-to-end protection across all network activity, not just the browser. Runs continuously in the background on Android and Windows.
TechnologyContent.pillar6Body: Evaluated with Precision, Recall, and F1-Score, focused on minimising false positives so academic sites aren't wrongly blocked.
TechnologyContent.finalBody: No data sent, no performance hit. Experience smart detection that respects your privacy.

adminPage.text_84: Manage psychoeducation modules, AI model releases, support tickets, and the emergency key.
adminPage.text_92: The emergency key is single-use and valid for 24 hours. Use it only if the Supervisor's WhatsApp is permanently unavailable.

loginPage.text_237: Sign in to your account to track your recovery progress.

create-groupPage.text_273: Bagikan kode grup ini ke mahasiswa Anda
create-groupPage.text_278: Sebagai Dosen/Pendamping, buat grup untuk mengawasi mahasiswa Anda.
create-groupPage.text_281: Kode grup unik akan dibuat secara otomatis. Bagikan kode ini ke mahasiswa melalui WA.

[id]Page.text_286: in depth. You’ll learn the basic concepts, the underlying psychological mechanisms, and practical techniques you can apply immediately in daily life to maintain self-regulation stability.
[id]Page.text_287: 1. Basic Concepts & The Importance of Self-Regulation
[id]Page.text_289: , failure to resist gambling urges is often caused by reduced cognitive-control capacity at critical moments (e.g. when tired, anxious, or under financial pressure). Understanding these vulnerable situations is a crucial first step.
[id]Page.text_292: Note the emotions you feel before the urge to access a gambling site appears (stress, boredom, or loneliness?).
[id]Page.text_294: When the urge appears, take a deep 10-second breath. Focus your mind on the long-term consequences.
[id]Page.text_296: Don’t hesitate to send a short message to your registered partner to ask for moral support.
[id]Page.text_297: Building solid self-control takes time and consistent practice. Every successful resistance to an impulsive urge, however small, is a step toward full recovery.
[id]Page.text_299: Finish reading the material above to record your progress.

[token]Page.text_305: Anda sekarang resmi terdaftar sebagai **Pendamping Akuntabilitas**. Anda akan menerima notifikasi jika pengguna terproteksi meminta izin penonaktifan atau pause proteksi.
[token]Page.text_309: Anda diundang untuk menjadi pendamping akuntabilitas pemulihan judi online. Tugas Anda adalah membantu memantau dan memberikan persetujuan saat diperlukan.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.intro: These terms govern your use of the Gamblock-AI prototype, an academic program (PKM-KC 2026). By using the service, you agree to the terms below.
TermsPage.s1Body:
By creating an account or using Gamblock-AI, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to all of these terms.
If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
TermsPage.s2Body:
Gamblock-AI is a non-commercial prototype developed within the Student Creativity Program (PKM-KC). The service may change, be interrupted, or be discontinued at any time for research purposes.
The service is provided "as is" without a guarantee of full availability.
TermsPage.s3Body:
You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity within your account.
You agree to provide accurate information at registration and not to misuse the service.
TermsPage.s4Body:
Some features require Accountability Partner approval for certain actions, including app removal.
This mechanism is designed to support recovery and operates within the limits of the operating system.
TermsPage.s5Body:
Gamblock-AI is a self-control aid, not a substitute for professional medical or psychological care.
The development team is not liable for losses arising from use or unavailability of the service.
TermsPage.s6Body:
We may update these terms as the program evolves. Material changes will be communicated through the service.
Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: Privacy is a core principle of Gamblock-AI. This policy explains what data we process and how we protect it, in line with the data-minimisation principle of Indonesia's Data Privacy Law.
PrivacyPage.s1Body:
All AI inference runs locally on your device (On-Device AI). URLs, domains, and browsing history are NEVER sent to any server.
Gambling-content detection happens entirely on-device with no outbound transmission of browsing data.
PrivacyPage.s2Body:
For accounts and accountability features, we process minimal data such as display name, email, and partner-group relationships.
Non-identifying aggregate data may be used for protection statistics, without revealing any individual's browsing history.
PrivacyPage.s3Body:
Reflection journals and sensitive notes are encrypted using the AES-256-GCM standard before storage.
We apply reasonable technical and organisational security measures to protect your data.
PrivacyPage.s4Body:
Partners only see aggregate scores and statistics, never a Member's raw URLs or browsing history.
This balances accountability with user privacy.
PrivacyPage.s5Body:
You have the right to access, correct, and request deletion of your personal data under applicable law.
Data-related requests can be submitted through the support center.
PrivacyPage.s6Body:
For privacy questions, please contact the development team via the support channels available in the app.
This policy may be updated and material changes will be communicated.

HelpPage.title: Help Center
HelpPage.intro: Find quick answers about installation, accounts, privacy, and the accountability features of Gamblock-AI.
HelpPage.s1Body:
Download the app on Android or Windows, create an account, then link with your partner using a Group Code.
Once linked, protection runs automatically in the background.
HelpPage.s2Body:
Use your registered email to sign in. Forgot your password? Use the "Forgot password" link on the sign-in page to reset it.
One Member account links to one partner group at a time.
HelpPage.s3Body:
All detection runs locally on the device. Your browsing history is never sent to a server.
Reflection journals are encrypted with the AES-256-GCM standard.
HelpPage.s4Body:
Uninstalling the app requires approval from a registered partner to protect the recovery commitment.
Partners only see aggregate statistics, never raw browsing history.
HelpPage.s5Body:
If your issue isn't resolved, reach our team via the Contact Us page.
We aim to respond as soon as possible during the program period.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.updated: We'd love to hear from you
ContactPage.intro: Have a question, feedback, or want to collaborate? Reach the Gamblock-AI team through the channels below.
ContactPage.s1Body:
For general questions and support: gamblock.ai@gmail.com
We try to reply within 1-3 business days during the program period.
ContactPage.s2Body:
Follow and message us on Instagram and Facebook: @gamblock.ai
We share updates and educational content there.
ContactPage.s3Body:
Gamblock-AI is developed by a student team at Universitas Teknologi Yogyakarta within the PKM-KC 2026 program.
For academic matters, please mention the team name and faculty advisor in your message.
ContactPage.s4Body:
Interested in supporting or piloting Gamblock-AI at your institution? Let us know via the email above.
We're open to research collaboration and field trials.

DownloadPage.title: Download App
DownloadPage.intro: Gamblock-AI runs as a lightweight background service. As an academic prototype, distribution is still limited.
DownloadPage.s1Body:
The Android app uses the Accessibility Service for real-time content inspection.
Download links will appear here after the public prototype release.
DownloadPage.s2Body:
The Windows client runs as a System Service with auto-restart for end-to-end protection.
Download links will appear here after the public prototype release.
DownloadPage.s3Body:
Android 8.0+ or Windows 10/11. The AI model is under 5 MB, so it stays light on the device.
An internet connection isn't required since blocking works locally (offline).
DownloadPage.s4Body:
Gamblock-AI is currently a PKM-KC 2026 prototype. Sign up to get early release information.
Follow our social media for availability updates.

partnerWorkspace.title: Support that protects student privacy
partnerWorkspace.description: This workspace only provides safe support paths. Synthetic metrics and example organizations are not shown as if they were real data.
partnerWorkspace.privacyBody: Partners cannot see a student's URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
partnerWorkspace.relationshipBody: View invitation and relationship status created with both parties' consent.
partnerWorkspace.approvalBody: Quick approvals still open from a valid token link. Aggregate lists will return after backend authorization and projections are hardened.
partnerWorkspace.supportBody: Use the help center to understand the partner role and provide support without excessive monitoring.

postIntervention.title: Create space before choosing your next step
postIntervention.description: You do not have to decide anything right now. Use this short exercise to slow the urge and return to what you can control.
postIntervention.privacyBody: This page does not receive URLs, domains, page text, or browsing history.
postIntervention.groundingDescription: Three rounds, about 36 seconds. Stop at any time if it feels uncomfortable.
postIntervention.completeBody: Notice anything that changed, however small. You still control the next decision.
postIntervention.supportTitle: If the urge still feels strong
postIntervention.supportBody: Choose a safer environment, contact someone you trust, or open the help center. Gamblock-AI is not a substitute for professional support.

educationLibrary.title: Learn skills, not just restrictions
educationLibrary.description: Published modules help you understand urges and practise responses you can choose for yourself.
educationLibrary.privacyNote: Reading progress never contains browsing history.
educationLibrary.errorBody: Check your connection and try again. No sample content is shown as if it were real data.
educationLibrary.emptyTitle: No modules have been published yet
educationLibrary.emptyBody: Modules will appear after they are reviewed and published by a content manager.
educationLibrary.moduleUnavailableBody: The module may not be published or may be temporarily unavailable.
educationLibrary.progressUnavailable: Progress tracking is not available for this module yet.
educationLibrary.contentEmpty: Module content is not available yet.

dashboardNav.logoutDescription: You will need to sign in again to access the dashboard.

recoveryDashboard.supportiveLine: Let's focus on one step you can take today.
recoveryDashboard.privacyStatus: Protection active, browsing data stays on your device
recoveryDashboard.privacyStatusUnknown: Browsing data stays on your device
recoveryDashboard.todayDescription: Follow what feels useful. You can stop and return at any time.
recoveryDashboard.intentionEmpty: Set a personal reason you want to protect during this process.
recoveryDashboard.intentionDialogDescription: Use your own words. This intention is stored only in the browser you are currently using.
recoveryDashboard.intentionInputLabel: What would you like to protect or change?
recoveryDashboard.intentionPlaceholder: Example: I want to finish university with a calmer mind.
recoveryDashboard.checkInDescription: There is no right or wrong answer. Choose what is closest to how you feel.
recoveryDashboard.privateBrowserNote: Stored only in this browser. It is not shared with your partner.
recoveryDashboard.memoryOnlyWarning: Browser storage is unavailable. Private data will only last while this tab remains open.
recoveryDashboard.checkInIncomplete: Choose your mood and urge strength first.
recoveryDashboard.missionDescription: One small step is enough for today.
recoveryDashboard.missionError: The mission is not available yet.
recoveryDashboard.mission1: Take a 90-second pause when an urge appears
recoveryDashboard.mission2: Record one mood and urge check-in
recoveryDashboard.mission3: Practise slow breathing for two minutes
recoveryDashboard.skillEyebrow: A skill that fits right now
recoveryDashboard.skillPrivateReason: This suggestion only uses the choices in your check-in, not your browsing history.
recoveryDashboard.skillPauseSummary: Create a brief space before choosing your next step.
recoveryDashboard.skillPausePractice: Place your feet on the floor. Breathe in for four counts, hold for two, then breathe out for six. Repeat three times.
recoveryDashboard.skillGroundSummary: Shift attention to real things you can see and feel.
recoveryDashboard.skillGroundPractice: Name five things you see, four things you feel, three sounds, two scents, and one thing you appreciate.
recoveryDashboard.skillReachSummary: You do not have to move through a difficult moment alone when you need support.
recoveryDashboard.skillReachPractice: Choose one trusted person. Send a short message saying you need someone to talk to or a distraction for a few minutes.
recoveryDashboard.skillMoveSummary: Changing position and place can interrupt an automatic pattern.
recoveryDashboard.skillMovePractice: Stand up, drink some water, then walk slowly for two minutes in a safe space.
recoveryDashboard.skillFocusSummary: Choose one small task to give your attention a clear direction.
recoveryDashboard.skillFocusPractice: Write down one task you can finish in 15 minutes. Close unnecessary distractions, start a timer, and work only on that step.
recoveryDashboard.skillBudgetSummary: Bring financial decisions back to needs you choose for yourself.
recoveryDashboard.skillBudgetPractice: Choose one important expense for the next seven days, note a safe limit, then choose one small action to protect it.
recoveryDashboard.skillCreativeSummary: Use a light creative activity to redirect an automatic pattern.
recoveryDashboard.skillCreativePractice: Choose an activity such as drawing, writing, or playing music. Do it for 10 minutes without judging the result.
recoveryDashboard.skillAwaitingTitle: Complete a check-in for a relevant suggestion
recoveryDashboard.skillAwaitingBody: Recommendations are only created from the mood and urge you choose yourself.
recoveryDashboard.reasonStrongUrge: The urge you selected is fairly strong, so a quick and concrete exercise may be easier to start.
recoveryDashboard.reasonLowMood: The mood you selected feels heavy, so reconnecting with your surroundings may help.
recoveryDashboard.reasonCalm: You are feeling calm enough to practise a skill before a situation becomes harder.
recoveryDashboard.reasonDefault: This option fits the check-in you just completed and takes only a few minutes.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyPrivate: Based on private check-ins that only you can see.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyInsufficient: There is not enough data to show a meaningful pattern yet.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyNeedMore: Save {count} more check-ins to unlock your weekly review.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyRecorded: You recorded {count} check-ins in the last seven days.
recoveryDashboard.weeklyAccessibleSummary: Mood chart from your private check-ins during the last seven days.
recoveryDashboard.protectionDescription: A technical summary without browsing details.
recoveryDashboard.protectionUnavailable: Device status is not available yet.
recoveryDashboard.partnerDescription: The partner dashboard only opens relationships, approvals, and permitted aggregates. Mood, intentions, journals, and browsing history remain private.
recoveryDashboard.partnerPrivacyBody: No URL, domain, mood, intentions, journals, and browsing history remain private.
recoveryDashboard.localDataCleared: Local recovery data has been cleared.
recoveryDashboard.quickJournalDesc: Write a short sentence about how you feel right now. It helps to clear your mind.
recoveryDashboard.streakDesc: You are doing great! Keep up the good work.
recoveryDashboard.biteSizedLearningDesc: Pausing for 10 seconds before acting on an urge can significantly reduce impulsive behaviors.
recoveryDashboard.emergencyHelpDesc: If the urge feels overwhelming, reach out immediately.

recoveryHub.title: Build a recovery approach that fits you
recoveryHub.description: Manage your intention, practise skills, and choose support without sharing private notes with a partner.
recoveryHub.privateBody: Intentions and practice choices on this page are stored only in the browser you are currently using.
recoveryHub.intentionDescription: An intention can be edited, paused, or archived. Changing direction is not failure.
recoveryHub.noIntention: There is no active intention yet.
recoveryHub.historyEmpty: History will appear after you create an intention or change its status.
recoveryHub.skillsDescription: Choose a short exercise before you need it.
recoveryHub.educationBody: Use psychoeducation modules to understand urges and ways to respond.
recoveryHub.supportBody: Contact someone you trust or open the help center if the situation feels hard to manage alone.
recoveryHub.deleteLocalBody: This removes intentions, check-ins, and weekly plans from this browser. It cannot be undone.
recoveryHub.deleteLocalConfirm: Yes, clear it from this browser
recoveryHub.journalDescription: Write down your thoughts securely. All entries are encrypted before being stored on the server.
recoveryHub.journalInputPlaceholder: How did you manage your urges today?

weeklyReview.title: Weekly review
weeklyReview.description: See the patterns you recorded, then choose one adjustment for next week.
weeklyReview.insufficientBody: We need at least three check-ins in seven days so we do not draw conclusions from too little data.
weeklyReview.stableSummary: The mood you recorded was relatively steady this week.
weeklyReview.variableSummary: The mood you recorded changed a few times this week.
weeklyReview.higherUrgeSummary: A stronger urge appeared in {count} check-ins.
weeklyReview.helpfulDescription: Choose what felt most useful this week.
weeklyReview.helpfulUnknownHint: That is okay. You can try a different option next week.
weeklyReview.intentionEmpty: There is no active intention to review yet.
weeklyReview.recommendationReason: The suggestion uses check-ins you entered yourself, not your browsing history.
weeklyReview.planSaved: Next week's plan is saved in this browser.
weeklyReview.privacyFooter: Mood, urges, intentions, and reflections are not shared with your partner.

settingsWorkspace.title: Manage your protection preferences
settingsWorkspace.description: Configure protection boundaries, accountability relationships, and privacy settings from one place.
settingsWorkspace.boundaryBody: Device-level protection settings are managed from the installed app. This page connects you to accountability and privacy features.
settingsWorkspace.deviceBody: The app runs as a background service on your device. Sensitivity and blocking rules are configured in the installed client.
settingsWorkspace.accountabilityBody: Connect with a trusted person who can approve protection changes and support your recovery commitment.
settingsWorkspace.privacyBody: Export your data or request account deletion in compliance with privacy regulations.
settingsWorkspace.helpBody: Submit a support ticket or access setup guides for the Gamblock-AI protection system.

supportWorkspace.title: Get help with the protection system
supportWorkspace.description: Submit a support ticket for technical issues, device recovery, accountability questions, or privacy requests.
supportWorkspace.privacyBody: Support tickets are encrypted locally before submission. Bug reports never contain browsing history.
supportWorkspace.formBody: Describe the issue you are experiencing. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
supportWorkspace.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the technical issue you are facing (mention OS/browser type if relevant)...
supportWorkspace.descriptionHelp: All bug-reporting logs are encrypted locally before being sent to our technical operators for data-privacy compliance.
supportWorkspace.success: Your support ticket was created! Our technical team will respond within 24 hours.
supportWorkspace.safeReportBody: Support tickets are handled by the technical team only. Your browsing history is never included.
supportWorkspace.historyBody: Previous support tickets and their statuses will appear here.
supportWorkspace.historyBoundary: Ticket history is not available in the current prototype.
supportWorkspace.urgentBody: If the situation feels hard to manage alone, contact someone you trust or call a crisis helpline.

profileWorkspace.title: Your account information
profileWorkspace.description: Update your display name and manage security settings for your Gamblock-AI account.
profileWorkspace.sessionBody: Your session is protected by an encrypted token. Sign out from devices you no longer use.
profileWorkspace.identityBody: Your display name and account email. The email address cannot be changed from this page.
profileWorkspace.displayNameHelp: This name is shown in the dashboard and to your accountability partner.
profileWorkspace.emailReadonly: Email address is managed by the authentication provider and cannot be changed here.
profileWorkspace.securityBody: Use the reset password flow to change your account password securely.
profileWorkspace.accountTruthBody: Your account data is stored securely. Use the data requests page to export or delete your data.

dataRequestsWorkspace.title: Your data, your control
dataRequestsWorkspace.description: Export your activity history or request account deletion in compliance with privacy regulations.
dataRequestsWorkspace.privacyBody: All data requests follow the data-minimisation principle. Browsing history is never included because it never leaves your device.
dataRequestsWorkspace.localDataBody: Detection logs and browsing data exist only on your device. Server-side data includes account identity, protection events, and recovery entries.
dataRequestsWorkspace.exportBody: Download your protection activity archives, ruleset sync history, and recovery entries in standard JSON/ZIP format.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteBody: Permanently deletes your account identity on our servers. This action requires email confirmation and cannot be undone.
dataRequestsWorkspace.exportSuccess: Data export request submitted. You will receive a download link when it is ready.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteSuccess: Account deletion request submitted. Check your email for confirmation.
dataRequestsWorkspace.requestError: Failed to process your request. Please try again.
dataRequestsWorkspace.historyBody: Track the status of your data export and deletion requests.
dataRequestsWorkspace.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
dataRequestsWorkspace.emptyBody: Requests you submit will appear here with their status.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteDialogBody: This action is irreversible. All your server-side data will be permanently removed.
dataRequestsWorkspace.deleteScopeBody: Account identity, protection events, recovery entries, and partner relationships. Local device data is not affected.

accountabilityWorkspace.title: Recovery is stronger together
accountabilityWorkspace.description: Connect with a trusted partner who can approve protection changes and support your recovery commitment.
accountabilityWorkspace.privacyBody: Partners cannot see your URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
accountabilityWorkspace.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerDescription: Invite a trusted person to become your accountability partner for protection change approvals.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerEmailHelp: Enter the email of your trusted partner (e.g. family, close friend, or counselor).
accountabilityWorkspace.activePartnerHelp: Your partner is connected and will receive approval requests when you need to change protection settings.
accountabilityWorkspace.invitedPartnerHelp: An invitation has been sent. Your partner needs to accept it to complete the connection.
accountabilityWorkspace.revokeDialogBody: You will need to invite a new partner to restore approval-based protection changes.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalDescription: Submit a request to your partner for approval to change protection settings.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalActiveBody: Your partner is connected. You can submit a request to change protection settings.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalInactiveBody: Connect a partner first to enable approval-based protection changes.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalDialogBody: Under the social accountability protocol, changing protection settings requires your partner's approval. Provide your reason below.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalReasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to change protection settings? Write an honest reason for your partner...
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalReasonAudience: This reason will be shared with your partner for their review.
accountabilityWorkspace.pendingBody: A request is waiting for your partner's decision. You will be notified when they respond.
accountabilityWorkspace.cancelDialogBody: You can submit a new request later if needed.
accountabilityWorkspace.historyDescription: Previous approval requests and their outcomes.
accountabilityWorkspace.historyEmptyBody: Approval requests you submit will appear here.

NotFound.message: The page you are looking for was not found.
